parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, business: $json.business, platforms: $json.platforms, ads: $json.ads, generated_at: $json.generated_at } }}

meta.description: POST {business, offer, target_audience?, platforms?, tone?, cta?, job_id?, callback_url?} → generates Facebook, Instagram, and Google RSA ad copy via Claude Sonnet. Returns structured JSON. Optionally callbacks to AutoBoros.
